negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_95cce745-3fcc-4f83-8807-1e249235ab39
prompt: A ceremonial scene unfolds outside of an ornately decorated temple with a majestic snow-capped mountain backdrop. The temple, positioned in the center-left part of the screen, is the main focus and is adorned with cascading orange and yellow flower garlands, completely covering its walls. The edges of the temple’s roof and frames are outlined by flowers thicker than the garlands in shape, in varying hues. The rake edge of the roof is decorated by a small rectangular image with a yellow garland background, and inside it, a symbol is prominently colored by purple and maroon garlands. At the heart of the structure, there is something written in purple garland-colored South Asian script, and below it, something written in red garland-colored South Asian script, both covered by yellow flower garlands. Only the top part of the temple is visible.  Behind the temple is a tall stone structure with a trapezoidal base and blue columns supporting a ridged roof. Above the roof is a golden chattra spire. Four orange flags with two banners are hoisted atop poles with pointy metallic tips, fluttering energetically in the air and positioned in front of the temple. The poles move up and down dynamically. The background is a stunning snowy mountain range enveloping the temple. The lighting in the video is natural, casting a warm glow over the scene.  The camera makes subtle random motions, tilting up and to the right slightly, revealing more of the sky and mountain tops. The lower right side of the screen features a yellow column part of another structure decorated in yellow garlands, mirroring the temple's festive adornment. The overall scene is vibrant and lively, capturing the essence of a significant cultural or religious event against the breathtaking backdrop of nature.
